task.title: Configure the OAM Route on the Managed Node
task.shortdesc: This example procedure shows how to configure the OAM route on the managed node for management access on the overlay.

context.p: In our example, since we only have a single interface for the Linux kernel, we'll simply add a default route to point to the local Cloud-Native Router.
If your installation has more than one interface for the Linux kernel, then you might want to add a specific route for the OAM traffic instead.

step.cmd: Create a default route to 10.10.1.1 on the Linux kernel on the managed node.

info.codeblock: ip route show default via 10.10.1.1 dev ens1f0v0
